content:
# AI Service Finder Response

A customer says: "I moved house and need to update my details." The assistant should guide them to a change-of-address service and warn when linked transport records may need confirmation.

## Retrieved Context

| Source context | How it informs the response | Freshness / risk |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Transport customer service centres | Provides a non-digital fallback if identity cannot be confirmed online. | Service availability should be checked live. |
| Registration online services | Shows address changes may relate to registration and customer records. | Transaction rules belong to the official service. |
| Queensland Open Data catalogue | Gives auditable source categories for demo context. | Catalogue metadata can be stale. |
| Registration enquiry themes | Supports treating address changes as a common customer-service route. | Aggregated trend only. |

## Recommended Service

| Recommendation | Reason |
| --- | --- |
| Change customer address | The user wants to update personal contact details. |
| Authenticated profile update | Address changes require identity confirmation. |
| Linked record check | Licences, registrations, and notices may use the address. |
| Service-centre fallback | Manual help may be needed if identity cannot be verified. |

## Required Information

| Item | Use |
| --- | --- |
| New residential address | Main profile update. |
| Mailing address | Needed if different from residential address. |
| Effective date | Determines when the change applies. |
| Contact email | Used for confirmation. |

## Confidence and Review Flags

| Signal | Assessment |
| --- | --- |
| Intent confidence | High |
| Source confidence | Medium: route is clear, linked-record effects need backend confirmation |
| Human review | Required if identity cannot be verified |
| Sensitive data | Address must not be sent to analytics or logs |

## Knowledge Graph

```mermaid
graph LR
    Intent[Customer intent] --> Retrieval[Retrieved context]
    Retrieval --> OpenData[Queensland Open Data]
    Retrieval --> Centres[Service centres]
    Retrieval --> Enquiries[Registration enquiries]
    Intent --> Service[Change address]
    Service --> Identity[Identity check]
    Service --> Profile[Customer profile]
    Profile --> Licence[Licence record]
    Profile --> Rego[Registration record]
    Service --> Audit[Audit log]
    Identity --> Review[Manual review]
```

## Safe Response Notes

- Keep the response short and action-oriented.
- Confirm whether mailing and residential addresses differ.
- Explain that some records may update immediately while others need review.
- Show a stale-data warning if service-centre details are surfaced from cached source context.
